rationale: The cited paper appears highly relevant as a potential theory/mechanism source: both notes describe analytical signaling models under asymmetric information with separating/pooling logic and PBE refinements (citing paper: joint price-quality signaling; cited paper: simultaneous signaling and screening via warranties).
